title: Grand Adventure [RPG]
description: A Modpack to explore, learn spells and overthrow the undead ruled gigantic World created by Big Globe.
body:
# Grand Adventure [RPG]
Set out on a journey where the world itself feels enormous, dangerous, and alive. Grand Adventure combines massive exploration, RPG-style progression, and tougher survival into one thrilling experience.
## Terrain
Thanks to [Big Globe](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-globe), the terrain is on a whole new scale. Biomes stretch for miles, mountains rise like natural fortresses, and oceans truly separate continents. Traveling the world isn’t just a side activity—it’s the heart of the adventure.
## Equipment
With the [RPG-Series](https://modrinth.com/mod/rogues-and-warriors), you don’t just spawn in with nothing—you start as a character. Warriors, rogues, spellcasters—each class comes with unique gear and playstyle, letting you carve your path like in a tabletop role-playing campaign.
## Mobs
The world pushes back hard. Mobs are stronger, smarter, and hungrier, turning every fight into a real challenge. Even the common enemies you thought you knew now feel dangerous, making survival an accomplishment instead of a routine.
## Food
Of course, danger isn’t everything. [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) lets you cook up real meals, adding both flavor and strategy to your survival. A full belly isn’t just comfort—it’s your edge against the wild.
## Summary
Grand Adventure is all about scale and challenge. Huge lands to explore, real progression through RPG mechanics, and a survival experience that refuses to be easy. Whether you roam endlessly, master your role, or test yourself against the toughest foes, the journey will shape your story.
